visual_description: In a dimly lit, cluttered room, three men stand in a tense formation. The central figure, a man with pale, platinum-blonde hair, is the focus. He wears a black high-collared shirt and points a wand forward with a determined, almost menacing expression. To his left, another man with dark hair and a black shirt mirrors the gesture, also pointing his wand. To the right, a third man with a shaved head and a black shirt looks on with a serious, supportive gaze. The background is dark and filled with indistinct, shadowy objects, suggesting a storage room or a dark, old building. A watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible in the top right corner. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame. The camera remains stationary, holding a medium shot on the trio. A male voice speaks in a low, menacing, and condescending tone, his words delivered slowly and deliberately to create a sense of threat and superiority. "Understand me?" he asks, his voice dripping with a cold, challenging quality. After a brief pause, he repeats with even more intensity, "You know what I mean?" The background is filled with a low, ominous, and suspenseful ambient sound
